title: Ban deleted GitHub accounts, skip banned users in upgrade workflow
author: ElliotEtag

gist.headline: Sweeping up the ghost spores
gist.blurb: Our automated upgrade script now skips over deleted GitHub accounts, keeping our database tidy and saving API calls. A little spring cleaning for the hive!
gist.summary: Updated the Spore-to-Seed upgrade workflow to automatically flag and skip users with deleted GitHub accounts.
gist.impact: This improves the efficiency of our automated upgrade scripts by preventing repeated API calls for non-existent accounts.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee doing some garden cleanup, sweeping away dead leaves or ghost-like pixel sprites, representing the removal of deleted accounts. Nomnom eating old discarded files.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny scarf, sweeping up gray pixelated ghost leaves in a digital garden. The round tan Nomnom creature happily eats a stack of dusty old files. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
